Teacher's Syllabus  
 

Lore Item Placeable
Slot: RANGE
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
WIS: +3 INT: +3 MANA: +20
SV POISON: +20
Focus: Enhancement Haste II
WT: 0.5 Size: SMALL
Class: CLR SHM NEC WIZ MAG ENC
Race: ALL except BAR ELF HEF TRL OGR VAH
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)
Teacher's Syllabus
Lore Item Placeable
Slot: RANGE
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
WIS: +3 INT: +3 MANA: +20
SV POISON: +20
Focus: Enhancement Haste II
WT: 0.5 Size: SMALL
Class: CLR SHM NEC WIZ MAG ENC
Race: ALL except BAR ELF HEF TRL OGR VAH
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)

Item Lore:Thrown paper is grounds for expulsion
Item Type:Armor
Stackable:No
Merchant Value:10 pp 0 gp 0 sp 0 cp
Tribute:479
Lucy Entry By:Kerasota
Item Updated By:SwiftyMUSE
Source:Live
IC Last Updated:2022-01-11 05:31:04
Page Updated:Thu Oct 9th, 2008

Expansion: Scars of Velious
Average Price: 425pp Pricing Data...
Rarity: Uncommon
Level to Attain: 35
[Drops | Comments ]

Drops

This item is found on creatures.

Tower of Frozen Shadow
NPC Name
an angry librarian


Zone(s) Found In:


Zone Name
Tower of Frozen Shadow


Uploaded November 27th, 2008

been here in tofs 13 DAYS for this drop for my clkassic druid. angry librarian did not spawn for first 8 days and 839 mobs, of course when he di id spawn he didnt drop it, in the last 13 days he has popped 4 times ponly and i have killed excess of 1250 mobs
he has dropped students homework 3 times, and nothing at all but key once.

only things i need are gnomey tunic and sylaabus of course i have not seen either fgo them

▲ Page top
Comes with Effect
QuoteReply
# Jun 06 2002 at 6:45 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1662941926682
View User Forum
1 post
I logged on Just today to find my Teachers Syllabus has effect "Enhancement Haste II" added to it. I'm dancing a mighty Dwarven Jig here...but, ah, What exactly IS Enhancement Haste?

▲ Page top
RE: Comes with Effect
QuoteReply
# Jun 06 2002 at 7:37 PM Rating: Good
__DEL__1591767079068
Sage
266 posts
Increases casting speed of buffs, up to the lvl 44 spells. Enchancement (buffs) Haste (speeds casting time (II) the second version, good to lvl 44. EHIII works on all buffs to lvl 60.
▲ Page top
common drop??
QuoteReply
# May 02 2002 at 11:43 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591769639915
10 posts
What is her common drop as me and a friend were camping her for the keys..she dropped TS both times :)
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Jan 07 2002 at 11:16 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) You guys are all talkin about yada yada yada #, this that the other thing. If your in that tower to begin with you need to have a high level wizard with you anyways. How to solve your dilema, Supernova. It hits for close to 900, and it hits 12 targets at a time. In other words, kills most everything you bring in a 10 mob pull, in one cast.

QuoteReply
# Aug 29 2001 at 5:48 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592757843847
2 posts
14 hours straight 102 teacher homeworks and not 1 syllabus. Rare or uber rare you tell me. oh and its real simple to get her to spawn take 2 50 plus necros and a 40 cleric and just massively wipe out the floor every minute or so lol
▲ Page top
Got the Syllabus!
QuoteReply
# Jul 15 2001 at 12:46 PM Rating: Good
__DEL__1630282709253
4 posts
My guild and I camped the second floor of the Tower. We were there less than hour. In about 15 minutes, the angry librarian spawned and the student's homework dropped. Our group gave the homework to our Wizard. In about another 15 minutes the librarian spawned again and dropped the syllabus! I, being the cleric, got the syllabus. I was tres happy! Perhaps, it was just luck, but she spawned quickly and dropped the supposed rare item. Oh, we also had to clear a whole bunch of students and other mobs on the floor. I'm not sure if that's what got the angry librarian to spawn. At one point, I think we killed 10 mobs in a row. Anyway, just wanted to post my experience.
▲ Page top

QuoteReply
# May 13 2001 at 8:04 AM Rating: Default

View User Forum

▲ Page top

QuoteReply
# May 28 2001 at 9:33 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591757693784
12 posts
Not really, its worth about 3-4k on veeshan.
▲ Page top
gauranteed angry librarian
QuoteReply
# May 12 2001 at 9:12 PM Rating: Good
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
ok i have gotten many keys this way.1 you will need IVU to do it .2 go around(with IVU on) to each mob in the second floor stand back a ways and try to hand them a coin(this is important you arnt close)pay attention to the spam you'll be reading it will say something like"you are to far away to trade with a student#_03" the "#" is the important thing you are looking for. 3. if you find a mob with the "#" by its name in the trade spam it is the PH for the angry librarian you have to kill it and soon as it dies the angry will spawn imedietly so be prepared 4. if non of the mobs have the "#" in the trade spam then you can pick any static spawn and kill it alone each time it spawns do the trade from a distance routine untill you see the "#" as long as no one else kills any other mobs in the zone the PH will spawn rather quickly keep in mind there can be only one PH so if you clear the whole floor the PH can spawn at any spot making your job much harder but if you kill a set 2 mobs(alot of ppl sit in the librarian circle and kill her and the library assistant thats why youll hear mixed rumors about killing the librarian to get the PH it is possible like this but its all random)in a controlled enviroment you wont have to worry about being suprized by the PH. this is true for any mob on any floor the one with the "#" will spawn the angry mob example angry relative,angry librarian etc....... i hope this will help you out and isnt going to confuse anyone
▲ Page top
RE: gauranteed angry librarian
QuoteReply
# Jan 16 2004 at 10:37 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591749845897
236 posts
Very good stuff, anonymous. I'll be sure to check this out next time I'm up there. Clever trick.

# Apr 23 2001 at 6:17 AM Rating: Default

the facts:

angry lib is a random spawn after killing some soradic mob

1st time i saw her it was right away, tonight it took 2 hours

and the sylabus is a rare drop which now adorns my range slot

I won the roll! neener neener neener! =)

i'll say that here cause i couldnn't say it there! =)

View User Forum
Anonymous

▲ Page top
More Facts
QuoteReply
# Jan 10 2001 at 10:14 AM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
The Angry Librarian can spawn anywhere on the floor. You just need to wipe out all the spawns for better chances. I personally camped at the upper left corner near zone in. Works as well.

The Angry Librarian loads Students HW (Semi Common), Teachers Syllabus (Rare), or nothing
He always drops the key.

The spawn is not that rare. It's prolly random in all servers. Ive camped the spot for 5 hours, got 4 to spawn. 3 students and 1 with nuttin.
▲ Page top
RARE drop off of a RARE, semi-triggered spawn (THere IS text
QuoteReply
# Dec 31 2000 at 8:18 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593361142135
70 posts
Angry Librarian is a RARE spawn, you have to kill a sheeyteload of students, librarians, and teachers to get her to spawn in the dorner to the left and close to the port in to the second floor. Grouped there 2 nights in a row, and say Angry 3 times. All three times, she dropped the Student's Homework (Angry at the student's homework, eh? Getting F's, are we?) Teacher Syllabus..... I've never seen it. But I want to. Oh, yes, Precious, if we get Teacher's Syllabus, we'll get the other 2k plat we need for a Flowing Black Silk Sash, YES, Precious, yessssss!

There's some Tolkien for the day

▲ Page top

#Anonymous, Posted: Jan 20 2001 at 8:00 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) people post info on items they have aquired here moron
#Anonymous, Posted: Jan 15 2001 at 9:15 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Bull man, 3 spawns with 3 of the loots? Thats a bunch of crap, if you were so cool to get that, you wouldnt even be here looking at what this guy drops, loser.
Facts
QuoteReply
# Dec 22 2000 at 11:37 AM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
This item drops off the Angry Librarian. It is her rare drop. Student's Homework is common.

The Angry Librarian is a random spawn on the second floor. You pretty much just have to keep clearing the floor until it spawns.

I happened to see the angry librarian, kill her and loot this out of luck one time when I was running up to level 5 to meet some friends.
